subject: Re: Gina Offenstein
body:
call me  monday


----- Original Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, December 8, 2006 10:42:20 PM
Subject: Gina Offenstein



Hi Cecilia, how have you been? 
 
It has been a long time since we have had any communication. I am wondering how Jeffrey is? I do not want to bother him, however, I have something to speak to him about. I have been working quite long hours, very intensely, and would like to speak to him about my business. Would you ask him if he would give me a few minutes of his time? I can promise that he may even enjoy it. Since arriving the states, I have spent so much time and energy trying to begin a new career which matched my lifestyle and personality. I am finally set up and my business is taking off like crazy. I wanted to wait for the right moment before approaching Jeffrey. I am in the business of Jet Service. My competition is basically Marquis, Sentient, Sky Jet, Blue Star, One Sky, etc. However, I can only say that we are offering something unique in that we are not a fractional ownership program, and we offer many additional perks which other companies do not. I am attaching our web site to look at and I
 sincerely hope that he will call me or ask to see me. 
 
Thanks Cecilia and take care, Gina
www.ariseair.com
gmo@ariseair.com


 
____________________________________________________________________________________
Do you Yahoo!?
Everyone is raving about the all-new Yahoo! Mail beta.
http://new.mail.yahoo.com
